page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a base frequency of 3.2 GHz. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, each of the 4 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps to support external data transfers and block storage connectivity. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation combined with a dense memory configuration offers a predictable resource profile for memory-bound workloads, avoiding the performance variability associated with shared-core or hyperthreaded environments.

The ecs.r9i.xlarge is designed for workloads that require significant memory capacity relative to compute power. Suitable use cases include medium-sized relational databases, in-memory caching layers, data buffering, and enterprise applications that demand consistent CPU performance alongside a larger memory footprint.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores on an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 32.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without hyperthreading interference. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive applications that do not require massive parallel compute. It is well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring stable processing power and a substantial memory footprint.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for database and caching workloads.

tagline: A dedicated four-core x86_64 instance featuring a high memory-to-CPU ratio for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database caching.
